patterns.message: Import design-system components from 'index.js', not component internals.

no-restricted-syntax.message: Raw hex color — use a design-system color token via var().
Raw px value — use a design-system spacing token via var().
Font not provided by the design system. Available: Onest, Bitter.
<AISummaryBlock> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: title, state, summary, points, style.
<AISummaryBlock> state must be one of 'ready' | 'loading'.
<Alert> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: tone, title, icon, onClose, action, children, style.
<Alert> tone must be one of 'info' | 'success' | 'warning' | 'danger' | 'neutral'.
<Avatar> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: src, name, size, roundness, status.
<Avatar> size must be one of 'xs' | 'sm' | 'default' | 'lg' | 'xl' | '2xl'.
<Avatar> roundness must be one of 'round' | 'square'.
<Avatar> status must be one of 'online' | 'away' | 'busy' | 'offline'.
<Badge> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: variant, roundness, size, iconLeft, children.
<Badge> variant must be one of 'neutral' | 'primary' | 'solid' | 'outline' | 'success' | 'warning' | 'danger' | 'info'.
<Badge> roundness must be one of 'default' | 'round'.
<Badge> size must be one of 'sm' | 'default' | 'lg'.
<BreadcrumbItem> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, href, icon.
<Button> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: variant, size, roundness, disabled, loading, iconLeft, iconRight, fullWidth, children.
<Button> variant must be one of 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'outline' | 'ghost' | 'destructive' | 'link'.
<Button> size must be one of 'sm' | 'default' | 'lg' | 'xl' | 'icon'.
<Button> roundness must be one of 'default' | 'round'.
<Card> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: padding, interactive, children.
<Checkbox> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: checked, defaultChecked, indeterminate, disabled, label, onChange, style.
<CommentItem> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: author, time, body, avatarSrc, role, pinned, actions, style.
<CycleCard> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: title, cycleLabel, status, progress, deadline, participants, highlight, onClick, style.
<CycleCard> status must be one of 'draft' | 'open' | 'action' | 'review' | 'done' | 'archived'.
<CycleStatusBadge> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: status, roundness, style.
<CycleStatusBadge> status must be one of 'draft' | 'open' | 'action' | 'review' | 'done' | 'archived'.
<CycleStatusBadge> roundness must be one of 'default' | 'round'.
<Dialog> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: open, onClose, title, description, footer, size, icon, children.
<Dialog> size must be one of 'sm' | 'default' | 'lg'.
<EmptyState> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: icon, image, title, description, action, compact, style.
<Label> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: required.
<IconButton> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: variant, size, roundness, ariaLabel, children.
<IconButton> variant must be one of 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'outline' | 'ghost'.
<IconButton> size must be one of 'sm' | 'default' | 'lg'.
<IconButton> roundness must be one of 'default' | 'round'.
<Input> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: size, invalid, iconLeft, iconRight.
<Input> size must be one of 'sm' | 'default' | 'lg'.
<Kbd> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: children, style.
<Logo> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: size, showWordmark, wordmark, tone, style.
<Logo> tone must be one of 'default' | 'light' | 'onDark'.
<NavItem> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: icon, label, active, badge, collapsed, onClick, style.
<Progress> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: value, size, tone, showLabel, style.
<Progress> size must be one of 'sm' | 'default' | 'lg'.
<Progress> tone must be one of 'primary' | 'success' | 'warning' | 'danger'.
<RadioOption> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: value, label, help.
<SelectOption> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: value, label.
<Separator> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: orientation, spacing, label, style.
<Separator> orientation must be one of 'horizontal' | 'vertical'.
<Skeleton> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: width, height, radius, circle, style.
<Spinner> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: size, thickness, color, style.
<Switch> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: checked, defaultChecked, disabled, label, onChange, style.
<TableColumn> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: key, header, align, width, render.
<TableColumn> align must be one of 'left' | 'center' | 'right'.
<TabItem> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: value, label, count, icon.
<Textarea> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: invalid.
<Toast> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: tone, title, description, icon, onClose, style.
<Toast> tone must be one of 'neutral' | 'success' | 'warning' | 'danger' | 'info'.
<Tooltip> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: content, side, children, style.
<Tooltip> side must be one of 'top' | 'bottom' | 'left' | 'right'.
